notes: All 46 entries are user-visible: label_template renders as a passive-suggestion card label, and query_template is the prompt body sent to the AI when the user taps the card. Both surfaces are UI text, neither is a panic message nor telemetry. Action: translate for all 46. Glossary observed: Warp/MCP/Agent etc unaffected (no occurrences); Pull Request kept English (Pull Request is a GitHub concept widely recognized verbatim; this also keeps the prompt natural when sent to the AI). Tech brands (Node.js, React, Next.js, Rust, Poetry, Django, Rails, Gradle, Maven, Go, Swift, Terraform, Prisma, Ruby, Modelfile, Kubernetes, Docker, Docker Compose, Vagrant, Vagrant box, SSH) preserved verbatim. Used 您 register throughout; full-width punctuation 。; placeholders {1} preserved in exact positions where each capture-group token (branch / project name / repo URL / pattern / box name) will substitute as an English identifier — wrapped by neutral Chinese context.
